name: idea-script-generation-fused
description: Generate ideas + scripts in single workflow (fused creation + script)

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return Array.from({ length: input.ideaCount }).map((_, index) => ({ json: { ...input, iteration: index + 1, ideaIndex: index } }));

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', temperature: $json.temperature, max_tokens: 140, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You generate concise TikTok content ideas. Return only the final idea text, no numbering, no markdown.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Language: ' + $json.language.label + '
Instruction: ' + $json.language.instruction + '
Category: ' + $json.category + ($json.topic ? '
User topic to use as the main subject: ' + $json.topic : '') + ($json.inspirationRef ? '
Inspiration/reference to respect: ' + $json.inspirationRef : '') + '

Generate exactly one unique TikTok content idea. The idea itself must be in the selected language, not English unless English was selected. Keep it specific, punchy, and under 140 characters. Return only the idea text.' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ category: $json.category, topic: $json.topic, status: 'new', pipelineStatus: 'idea_created', publishStatus: 'draft', platform: 'tiktok', templateId: $json.templateId || null, tiktokAccountOpenId: $json.tiktokAccountOpenId || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ scripts: $json.script, planned_scenes: $json.planned_scenes, generation_review: $json.generation_review, script_status: 'done', script_hook: $json.hook, caption: $json.caption, background_keyword: $json.background_keyword, pipeline_status: 'script_ready', llm_model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile' }) }}
